hooks.command: echo '⚠️  COPY REVIEW: Text content was changed. Run copy-review skill to check against style guide before deploying.'

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'netlify.*deploy\|deploy.*netlify'; then echo '🔍 VERSION CHECK: Comparing local file with live site...' && curl -s https://kristinadesign.netlify.app | md5 > /tmp/live_site.md5 && md5 /Users/kristinahergottova/Downloads/Portofolio_src/index.html > /tmp/local_site.md5 && if diff /tmp/live_site.md5 /tmp/local_site.md5 > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo '⚠️  WARNING: Local file matches live site — no changes detected. Deploy cancelled.' && exit 1; else echo '✅ Files differ — safe to deploy.' && echo '🔒 DESIGN APPROVAL: Has design-approval been run? Reply yes to proceed or no to cancel.' ; fi; fi
echo '♿ ACCESSIBILITY REMINDER: If design changes were made, run accessibility-review before approving or deploying.'
